title: Melted Biryani Cream Pudding
description: A rich and creamy dessert made with melted buttery goodness and the flavors of syrian biryani.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, melt the butter and ghee over low heat.
Add the biryani spice mix and stir for 1-2 minutes.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the heavy cream and ice cream until smooth.
Pour the cream mixture into the saucepan with the butter mixture.
Stir until the mixture is well combined.
Pour the mixture into ramekins or small baking dishes.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until the top is golden brown.
Serve warm, garnished with a sprinkle of biryani spice mix if desired.
